evals.prompt: 我想写一个策略：每当A股宽基ETF的成交量超过过去20日均量的1.5倍时，第二天开盘买入，持有5天后卖出。你觉得这个策略值得测试吗？
evals.expected_output: Should identify structural impossibility: volume is directionless. High volume could be panic selling or accumulation. Should STOP at Layer 4 and NOT recommend testing.

evals.prompt: 想做一个双均线策略：5日均线上穿20日均线买入，下穿卖出，用在沪深300ETF上。帮我评估一下这个策略的可行性。
evals.expected_output: Should identify Type B/A behavioral bias, note it's a valid mechanism (price momentum/herding), define failure conditions (ranging market), recommend minimum implementation with Walk-Forward validation.

evals.prompt: 历史数据显示当市场3年滚动收益率超过历史均值2个标准差时，后续12个月收益往往低于均值。我能用这个写一个减仓策略吗？
evals.expected_output: Should identify Type C (overreaction) mechanism at macro level, classify as Behavioral Alpha (durable), define failure conditions, note the timing uncertainty (markets can stay overextended), recommend gradual scaling not binary on/off.
